sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id UInt32, data Map(String, Nullable(String))) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, mapKeys(data) FROM test_map WHERE data['age'] IS NULL;
SELECT id, mapKeys(data) AS keys FROM test_map WHERE mapKeys(data)[1] = 'name' HAVING keys[1] <> '';
SELECT id, mapKeys(data) FROM test_map ORDER BY tupleElement(data, 1) IS NULL DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_agg AS SELECT id, mapKeys(data) AS keys FROM test_map GROUP BY id HAVING length(keys) > 1;
INSERT INTO test_agg SELECT id, mapKeys(data) FROM test_map WHERE data['score'] != '45.67';
SELECT id, mapKeys(data) AS keys FROM test_map WHERE has(keys, 'name') AND keys[1] = 'name' ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, mapKeys(data) FROM test_map WHERE mapKeys(data)[1] = 'age' AND data['age'] IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_map AS SELECT id, mapKeys(data) AS keys FROM test_map WHERE emptyString IS NULL;
